rationale: The cited paper is mentioned only once in the General Discussion to support a side interpretation that rejecting options can increase focus on indulgence. The citing paper's core theory, hypotheses, and studies center on discrepant fluency and expectation mismatch in customization, and they do not directly test or build on the cited paper's acquisition-versus-forfeiture hedonic-utilitarian framework. There is no direct method reuse or sustained conceptual dependence on this specific source.
